pageContext.name: Ultimate Gohan
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Bandai Spirits Ichibansho are proud to announce the newest release, Ultimate Gohan, from the newest anime show Dragon Ball Super Hero!  This figure is expertly crafted and meticulously sculpted to look like Ultimate Gohan from the new respective anime. Standing at approximately 9.8' tall, Ultimate Gohan is seen in his popular pose.  Be sure to collect this Great Saiyaman Golden Warrior and enhance your display with other incredible Ichibansho Dragon Ball figures!
